creator: iblis.dif01@nctu.edu.tw
text:
Created attachment 199120
julia 1.0.2 patch

This is a bug fix release.
https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/releases/tag/v1.0.2

% portlint 
looks fine.

poudriere testport
  - pass on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 with default OPTIONS
  - pass on 11.2-RELEASE i386  with default OPTIONS
  - pass on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 with all OPTIONS and OPENLIBM enabled
  - pass on 11.2-RELEASE i386  with all OPTIONS and OPENLIBM enabled
